stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from lineitem
where l_shipdate <= '1998-12-01':date - "'90' day":interval
group by l_returnflag, l_linestatus
select 
  l_returnflag,
  l_linestatus,
  SUM(l_quantity) as sum_qty,
  SUM(l_extendedprice) as sum_base_price,
  SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as sum_disc_price,
  SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) as sum_charge,
  AVG(l_quantity) as avg_qty,
  AVG(l_extendedprice) as avg_price,
  AVG(l_discount) as avg_disc,
  COUNT(*) as count_order
order by l_returnflag, l_linestatus

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from lineitem
where l_shipdate <= '1998-09-02'
group by l_returnflag, l_linestatus
agg
  sum(l_quantity) as sum_qty,
  sum(l_extendedprice) as sum_base_price,
  sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as sum_disc_price,
  sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) as sum_charge,
  avg(l_quantity) as avg_qty,
  avg(l_extendedprice) as avg_price,
  avg(l_discount) as avg_disc,
  count(*) as count_order
order by l_returnflag, l_linestatus

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
where 
  c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
  and o_orderdate < '1995-03-15':date
  and l_shipdate > '1995-03-15':date
group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
select 
  l_orderkey,
  SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue,
  o_orderdate,
  o_shippriority
order by revenue desc, o_orderdate
limit 10

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
where
  c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
  and o_orderdate < '1995-03-15'
  and l_shipdate > '1995-03-15'
group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
agg sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
order by revenue desc, o_orderdate
limit 10

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from {
  {
    from supplier
    join lineitem on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
    join orders on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
    join customer on c_custkey = o_custkey
    join nation as n1 on s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
    join nation as n2 on c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
    where 
      (
        (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'GERMANY')
        or (n1.n_name = 'GERMANY' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE')
      )
      and l_shipdate between '1995-01-01':date and '1996-12-31':date
    select 
      n1.n_name as supp_nation,
      n2.n_name as cust_nation,
      l_shipdate.extract('year') as l_year,
      l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume
  }
} as shipping
group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) as revenue
order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from supplier
join lineitem on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
join orders on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
join customer on c_custkey = o_custkey
join nation as n1 on s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
join nation as n2 on c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
where
  ((n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'GERMANY')
   or (n1.n_name = 'GERMANY' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE'))
  and l_shipdate between '1995-01-01' and '1996-12-31'
select
  n1.n_name as supp_nation,
  n2.n_name as cust_nation,
  extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year,
  l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume
group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
agg sum(volume) as revenue
order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from partsupp
join supplier on ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
where n_name = 'GERMANY'
group by ps_partkey
where 
  SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) > {
    from partsupp
    join supplier on ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
    join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
    where n_name = 'GERMANY'
    select SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) * 0.0001
  }
select ps_partkey, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) as `value`
order by `value` desc

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
model german_supply = {
  from partsupp
  join supplier on ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
  join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
  where n_name = 'GERMANY'
}

from german_supply
group by ps_partkey
agg sum(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) as value
where value > (
  from german_supply
  agg sum(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) * 0.0001
)
order by value desc

stages.name: Original
DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from customer
left join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
  and o_comment not like '%special%requests%'
group by c_custkey
agg count(o_orderkey) as c_count
group by c_count
agg count(*) as custdist
order by custdist desc, c_count desc

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from orders as o
where 
  o_totalprice > {
    from orders as o2
    where o2.o_custkey = o.o_custkey
    select AVG(o2.o_totalprice)
  }
select o_orderkey, o_totalprice

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from orders as o
where o_totalprice > (
  from orders as o2
  where o2.o_custkey = o.o_custkey
  agg avg(o2.o_totalprice)
)

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from supplier join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
where 
  n_name = 'CANADA'
  and exists {
    from partsupp
    where 
      ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
      and ps_availqty > {
        from lineitem
        where 
          l_partkey = ps_partkey
          and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
          and l_shipdate >= '1994-01-01':date
          and l_shipdate < '1995-01-01':date
        select 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity)
      }
    select 1
  }
select s_name, s_address

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from supplier
join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
where n_name = 'CANADA'
where exists(
  from partsupp
  where ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
  where ps_availqty > (
    from lineitem
    where l_partkey = ps_partkey
      and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
      and l_shipdate >= '1994-01-01'
      and l_shipdate < '1995-01-01'
    agg 0.5 * sum(l_quantity)
  )
)

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
join part on p_partkey = l_partkey
join supplier on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
where c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' and o_orderdate >= '1995-01-01':date
select c_name, o_orderdate, l_extendedprice, p_name, s_name
order by l_extendedprice desc
limit 20

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
join part on p_partkey = l_partkey
join supplier on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
where c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE'
  and o_orderdate >= '1995-01-01'
select c_name, o_orderdate, l_extendedprice, p_name, s_name
order by l_extendedprice desc
limit 20

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from lineitem
where l_shipdate >= '1995-01-01':date
select 
  l_orderkey,
  l_extendedprice,
  SUM(l_extendedprice) over (partition by l_orderkey) as order_total,
  RANK() over (partition by l_orderkey order by l_extendedprice desc)
  as price_rank,
  l_extendedprice / SUM(l_extendedprice) over (partition by l_orderkey)
  as price_pct
order by l_orderkey, price_rank

stages.name: DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from lineitem
where l_shipdate >= '1995-01-01'
select
  l_orderkey,
  l_extendedprice,
  sum(l_extendedprice) over (partition by l_orderkey) as order_total,
  rank() over (partition by l_orderkey order by l_extendedprice desc) as price_rank,
  l_extendedprice / sum(l_extendedprice) over (partition by l_orderkey) as price_pct
order by l_orderkey, price_rank

stages.name: Original
DeDup
stages.wvlet:
from customer
left join orders on o_custkey = c_custkey
group by c_custkey, c_name
agg
  count(o_orderkey) as order_count,
  sum(o_totalprice) as total_spent
where order_count > 0
order by total_spent desc
limit 10

stages.name: Original
stages.wvlet:
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
join nation on c_nationkey = n_nationkey
where 
  n_name = 'JAPAN'
  and o_orderdate >= '1996-01-01':date
  and o_orderdate < '1997-01-01':date
group by c_name, c_acctbal
where 
  SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) > {
    from {
      {
        from customer
        join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
        join lineitem on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
        join nation on c_nationkey = n_nationkey
        where 
          n_name = 'JAPAN'
          and o_orderdate >= '1995-01-01':date
          and o_orderdate < '1996-01-01':date
        group by c_custkey
        where 
          SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) > {
            from {
              {
                from customer
                join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
                join lineitem on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
                join nation on c_nationkey = n_nationkey
                where 
                  n_name = 'JAPAN'
                  and o_orderdate >= '1994-01-01':date
                  and o_orderdate < '1995-01-01':date
                group by c_custkey
                select SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as spend_94
              }
            } as base_94
            select AVG(spend_94)
          }
        select c_custkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as spend_95
      }
    } as good_95
    select AVG(spend_95)
  }
select c_name, c_acctbal, spend_96
order by spend_96 desc

stages.name: DeDup
